steps.title: Find the definition of 'composing'
steps.content: The passage says, “By doing ‘nothing’ and daydreaming, I am actually composing, even if words don’t immediately materialize,” which shows that Wong uses “composing” to describe the mental work that happens while she is not writing.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B says she is engaging in an important part of her writing process, which matches the idea that daydreaming is a form of composing.

The other three either describe deception, source gathering, or being soothed, none of which capture the mental‑creation aspect of composing.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
